days.label: Friday
days.note: Kids arrive. Spring break. Cloudy, ~45°F. Indoor day.

meals.name: Sausage, Eggs & Hawaiian Roll Toast
meals.description: Split hawaiian rolls, toast with butter on the Blackstone or in a pan — they crisp up beautifully.
steps: Split hawaiian rolls in half
Toast with butter on Blackstone or in a pan until golden
Cook sausage links until browned
Scramble or fry eggs to preference
Serve together — kids won't miss sliced bread

meals.name: Turkey & Cheese Roll-Ups + Veggies & Crackers
meals.description: Deli turkey, Kraft Singles or parmesan, rolled up with carrots and crackers. Zero cooking.
steps: Lay out deli turkey slices
Add cheese slice and roll up
Cut carrots into sticks
Arrange with crackers on plates
Let the kids build their own

meals.name: Dad's Spaghetti + Roasted Broccoli
meals.description: Brown ground beef with garlic and onion, simmer with marinara. Serve over spaghetti with parmesan.
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F for broccoli
Brown ground beef in a large pan, breaking it up
Add minced garlic and diced onion, cook 3 min
Season with Italian seasoning, salt, pepper
Add marinara sauce, simmer on low 15 min
Boil spaghetti according to package
Toss broccoli florets with olive oil, salt, pepper, smoked paprika
Roast broccoli at 425°F for 20 min until charred edges
Serve spaghetti with sauce and heavy parmesan shower
meals.leftoverNote: Make extra spaghetti for Saturday lunch.

days.label: Saturday
days.note: Full kid day. If it hits 60°F — BLACKSTONE DAY. Olivia has requested hot dogs.

meals.name: Kodiak Pancakes + Bacon
meals.description: Protein-packed Kodiak pancakes on the Blackstone. Giant Kirkland maple syrup jug ready to go.
steps: Heat Blackstone (or large pan) to medium
Mix Kodiak pancake batter per box instructions
Lay bacon strips on the Blackstone alongside
Pour pancake batter in circles, flip when bubbles form
Cook bacon until crispy
Serve stacked with maple syrup and butter

meals.name: Leftover Spaghetti
meals.description: Friday's leftovers. Microwave and done. No cooking, no thinking.
steps: Reheat in microwave 2-3 min
Serve with extra parmesan

meals.name: Gourmet Blackstone Hot Dogs + Crispy Smashed Potatoes
meals.description: All-beef hot dogs on the Blackstone with a build-your-own toppings bar. Crispy smashed potatoes on the side.
steps: Start caramelized onions FIRST — slice 2 large onions, cook low and slow on Blackstone with butter + pinch of sugar for 15-20 min
Boil baby potatoes until fork-tender (~15 min)
Smash potatoes flat on sheet pan with bottom of a glass
Drizzle smashed potatoes with olive oil, salt, pepper, garlic salt, smoked paprika
Roast potatoes at 425°F for 20-25 min until golden and crispy
Grill hot dogs on Blackstone while onions finish
Toast buns on Blackstone with butter
Set up toppings bar: caramelized onions, mustard, ketchup, BBQ sauce, relish, tomato slices

toppings.name: The Chicago-ish
toppings.items: Yellow mustard, sweet relish, diced onion, tomato slices, celery salt

toppings.name: The BBQ Dad
toppings.items: Sweet Baby Ray's BBQ sauce, crispy onion strings, pickled jalapeños

toppings.name: The Adult
toppings.items: Whole grain mustard, caramelized onions, sauerkraut, sriracha

days.label: Sunday
days.note: Mom's birthday dinner out. Keep it light and easy.

meals.name: Breakfast Burritos
meals.description: Scrambled eggs with sausage and cheese in warm tortillas. Kids build their own with salsa.
steps: Brown sausage in a pan, crumble as it cooks
Scramble eggs in same pan with sausage
Warm tortillas on the stove (10-15 sec each side)
Let kids build: eggs + sausage + cheese + salsa
Roll into burritos

meals.name: Pizza Singles + Carrots
meals.description: Sabatasso's pizza singles from the freezer. Air fry for extra crisp. Serve with carrots and hummus.
steps: Air fry pizza singles for extra crisp (follow package directions)
Cut carrots into sticks
Serve with hummus or ranch for dipping

days.label: Monday
days.note: Spring break continues. Cloudy, low 40s. Indoor comfort food day.

meals.name: Smoothies + Bagels with Cream Cheese
meals.description: Blend frozen fruit + yogurt + milk + hidden spinach. Mountain of cream cheese for the bagels.
ingredients: spinach (on hand — they won't taste it)
steps: Add frozen berries, banana, yogurt, splash of milk to blender
Toss in a handful of spinach (they won't taste it, promise)
Blend until smooth
Toast bagels and spread with cream cheese
Pour smoothies into cups

meals.name: Air Fryer Chicken Tenders + Fries
meals.description: Kirkland frozen chicken chunks + frozen fries in the air fryer. Serve with ketchup and Chick-fil-A sauce.
steps: Toss chicken chunks and fries in air fryer
Cook per package directions (usually 400°F, 10-12 min)
Serve with ketchup and Chick-fil-A sauce
Zero stress, zero thinking

meals.name: Goulash + Garlic Bread
meals.description: One-pot comfort food. Ground turkey, elbow macaroni, tomatoes — pasta cooks right in the sauce.
steps: Heat olive oil in large pot over medium-high heat
Brown ground turkey with diced onion, break up as it cooks
Add minced garlic, cook 1 min
Add diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, Italian seasoning, smoked paprika, salt, pepper
Bring to a boil, stir in elbow macaroni
Cover and simmer until pasta is tender (~15 min), stirring occasionally
For garlic bread: soften butter + minced garlic + Italian seasoning + pinch of salt
Spread compound butter on split brioche buns
Broil in oven 2-3 min until golden and bubbly
meals.leftoverNote: Goulash makes a TON. Tuesday lunch is covered — just microwave.

days.label: Tuesday
days.note: Spring break. Maybe a touch of sun, mid-40s.

meals.name: Eggs, Bacon & Toast
meals.description: Classic breakfast. Bacon and sliced bread from the Aldi run.
steps: Cook bacon in a pan or on the Blackstone until crispy
Fry or scramble eggs to preference
Toast bread with butter
Serve together — classic and easy

meals.name: Leftover Goulash
meals.description: Monday's goulash reheats perfectly. The pasta soaks up even more sauce overnight — almost better the next day.
steps: Reheat in microwave 2-3 min
Stir and serve

meals.name: Mini Meatloafs with Balsamic Glaze + Garlic Bread + Roasted Carrots
meals.description: Air fryer mini meatloafs with a tangy balsamic-ketchup glaze. Brioche garlic bread and honey-roasted carrots.
ingredients: brioche buns (BUY — same pack as Monday)
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F for carrots
Mix ground turkey with breadcrumbs, egg, minced garlic, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper, splash of Worcestershire
Shape into thick disc/loaf shapes — like big meatballs flattened slightly
Air fry at 390°F for 8-10 min
Mix balsamic glaze: ketchup + balsamic vinegar (roughly 2:1 ratio)
Brush meatloafs with glaze in last 2 minutes
Peel carrots, cut into sticks, toss with olive oil, salt, pepper, drizzle of honey
Roast carrots at 400°F for 25 min
Make garlic bread: compound butter on split brioche buns, broil 2-3 min

days.label: Wednesday
days.note: Kids here until 5pm. Then Chris & Olivia are FREE.

meals.name: Everything Bagel Breakfast Sandwiches
meals.description: Egg, sausage patty, american cheese on a toasted english muffin or bagel with Everything Bagel Seasoning.
steps: Form sausage into patties, cook in pan until browned
Fry eggs to preference (over-easy works great)
Toast english muffins or bagels
Stack: muffin bottom + sausage + egg + cheese + muffin top
Sprinkle with Everything Bagel Seasoning

meals.name: Loaded Chicken Teriyaki Rice Bowls
meals.description: Build-your-own bowls! Rice base, teriyaki chicken, roasted broccoli, sautéed zucchini, edamame. The last kid meal goes out with a bang.
steps: Start rice cooker with jasmine rice
Make teriyaki sauce: whisk 1/4 cup soy sauce + 2 tbsp honey + 1 tbsp rice vinegar (or balsamic) + 1 tsp minced garlic + 1 tsp minced ginger + cornstarch slurry (1 tsp cornstarch + 1 tbsp water)
Dice chicken thighs, season with salt, pepper, garlic salt
Sear chicken in hot pan until golden with crispy edges (~5 min)
Pour teriyaki sauce over chicken, toss, let thicken 2 min
Toss broccoli florets with olive oil, salt, smoked paprika — roast at 425°F for 15 min
Quick-sauté zucchini half-moons in hot pan with oil + garlic salt, 3-4 min
Steam frozen shelled edamame in microwave 2-3 min
Set up assembly line: rice → chicken → broccoli → zucchini → edamame
Top with green onions, sesame seeds, extra soy sauce, sriracha (adults)
meals.leftoverNote: Leftovers double as Chris & Olivia's dinner if you don't feel like going out.

meals.name: Order In or Teriyaki Bowl Leftovers
meals.description: End of 5-day kid stretch. You've earned a break. Leftovers are there if you want them.
